meta.dc:title: 119 HJRES 142 ENR: Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the D.C. Income and Franchise Tax Conformity and Revision Temporary Amendment Act of 2025.
meta.dc:creator: United States House of Representatives
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E S E C O N D S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Saturday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty-six

longTitle.officialTitle: Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the D.C. Income and Franchise Tax Conformity and Revision Temporary Amendment Act of 2025.

resolvingClause.i: Resolved by the Senate and House of Representatives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

section.content: That the Congress disapproves of the action of the District of Columbia Council described as follows: The D.C. Income and Franchise Tax Conformity and Revision Temporary Amendment Act of 2025 (D.C. Act 26–217), enacted by the Council of the District of Columbia on December 20, 2025, and transmitted to Congress pursuant to section 602(c)(1) of the District of Columbia Home Rule Act on December 30, 2025.

signature.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
